description:
Follow-up to fz-ul4.27.22.5. Extend the typer so cont's slot 0 Descr at a Term::CallClosure seam reflects the closure body's return type — not a blanket any. Then drop the return-slot half of the closure_target_fns force (currently kept via tagged_return_fns' closure_target_fns seed at src/ir_codegen.rs:2350-2356).

## Today

src/ir_typer.rs:1814-1835 (cont_slot0_descr): only handles Term::Call. For Term::CallClosure (and Receive), returns Descr::any(). Cont's slot 0 is therefore typed `any` → ArgRepr::Tagged → producer at CallClosure's TailCC indirect-call return sig must coerce to Tagged.

src/ir_codegen.rs:2350-2356 (tagged_return_fns seed): closure_target_fns is included so all closure-target bodies' return_reprs are forced Tagged. Today this is necessary because cont's slot 0 at the CallClosure seam expects Tagged (from cont_slot0_descr returning any).

## Change

1. Extend cont_slot0_descr at src/ir_typer.rs:1820 to handle Term::CallClosure: read the `closure` Var's Descr from caller_ft, JOIN over positive arrow clauses in `closure_descr.funcs`, take the union of return types. Fall back to Descr::any() for Conj::top, negative clauses, or empty funcs.

2. Add a Descr utility (src/types.rs) that JOINs return types across arrow DNF clauses. Name: `arrow_join_return` or `callable_return_union`.

3. Drop closure_target_fns from tagged_return_fns seed at src/ir_codegen.rs:2350. Keep the TailCallClosure-terminator seed (still needed for forwarding fns).

## Expected diff

Closure-using fixtures (closure_typed_captures.fz, spawn_with_captures.fz):
- Closure body @abi return slot narrows from Tagged to RawInt / RawF64 / etc.
- CallClosure cont's slot 0 sig narrows correspondingly.
- ishl/bor at body's Term::Return drops; sshr_imm at cont's entry drops.

## Acceptance

- cargo test --workspace green.
- BLESS=1 cargo test golden_clif records the narrower seam shapes.
- Add expect_clif_excludes assertions on relevant cont fns (no sshr at slot-0 load when closure body returns int).
- Net deletion: ~5 lines from tagged_return_fns seed + ~15 lines added to cont_slot0_descr + arrow_join_return helper.
title: fz-cps-seam.return: closure body return-slot narrowing via typer cont_slot0_descr
